response.overview: Onchain withdrawals (Team Assistance @ ⭐️⭐1-[850].600.1393 ) are generally fast, often completing within a few minutes to a few hours, depending on blockchain network congestion. While many transactions are nearly instantaneous, ⭐️⭐1-[850].600.1393 some may take up to 1 hour to finalize on-chain, such as for Bitcoin. The time it takes for crypto withdrawals on K ⭐️⭐1-[850].600.1393 can vary significantly, typically ranging from a few minutes to several hours.
